text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The kingdom of swords and spells, Umanest.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In this world, the title of fleetest goes not to the dire wolves, nor to
the wyverns.

text_block_list.name: Orc
text_block_list.text:
Bugro, bugrbrgrbgrrr, bugogogo?!
(Bullcrap! How can they be catching up with us?!)

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yaaaa! Stop it right there, you thievin' orc!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: We've caught up with it, El. It's time to attack!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You betcha, Grass! Hiyaaaah! CONDOR FISTS OF FURYYY!
A few hours earlier...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Here they are! The VR Umalators!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
VR... Umalators? Is that what these three things are, Director? They
look like metal caskets.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to explain. The VR Umalator is a racing simulator
developed for the use of Tracen Academy students.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Turf or dirt, firm or wet—the virtual track can emulate all kinds of
racecourse conditions.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmm... A customizable track certainly would be convenient.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nyahaha, a simulator though, huh? So much for being my personal
napping pod.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But wait! There's more—a feature that lets you play affiliated online
games in VR, using your own physical stats!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
With this add-on, we can send our beloved Umamusume to magical
kingdoms, sci-fi galaxies, cyberpunk cities... Anywhere you can dream
of!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
D-Director... You know how much I voiced my concerns over that
function...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Yet, you decided to install it regardless of the trouble it might cause.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course! My aim is to further expand the greatness of my
Umamusume! Even if I have to spend all my pocket money in the
process!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oooh, so you can run and play games, then? These machines can do everything!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh? It looks like someone's already trying one. Might I ask who?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
President Symboli Rudolf is giving it a test run on behalf of the
academy. We can't have our students utilizing faulty equipment.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's our trusty president! Hey, Director. I also wanna—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that a warning signal?

text_block_list.name: Machine Voice
text_block_list.text: Emergency, emergency. An anomaly has been detected in device 01.

text_block_list.name: Machine Voice
text_block_list.text:
Connecting devices 02 and 03 to the session may enable remote
repairs. If the issue persists, please perform a factory reset.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: A factory reset?! We can't!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
We'd have to reconfigure everything from scratch... What could be
happening in device 01?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf?
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It seems like the president is running like normal though...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, it sounds like the virtual world needs saving! Backup!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I know! Since everyone here's twiddlin' their thumbs, let me get in and fix it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm the sturdiest! Stubbornest! The absolute strongeeest! A little tech
trouble doesn't scare me!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: In that case, I'm going too.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If there's a problem with the machine, you might not be able to
handle it by yourself. I'll help you out, if need be.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Heh, a fabulous duo! Seeing as you're close friends, I'm sure you'll do
a fine job!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Try not to get yourselves hurt. Now, off you go!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Umm... I guess this is the start button. One push, and we should enter
runnin' mode...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait, this isn't running mode? What happened to connecting to
the same session?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Huhhh?! Where are we, Grass? What's this place? And what am I
wearin'?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It... looks like we're in some kind of fantasy game world. Did a
different mode get activated?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Fantasy... Then this get-up... I must be some kind of monk brawler.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: And it looks like I'm a cleric. Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I can even see my stats. I suppose that confirms the fantasy game
theory.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But why? We were meant to enter running mode and link with device
01...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's gotta be for a reason! Maybe we need to fix whatever problem's
unfoldin' in this world first!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, forgive me if I'm wrong, but I'm getting the impression you just
want to go exploring.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Though you have a point. If the device brought us here, the root of
the error might be close by.
Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, there's a crowd of people! Maybe they're fellow players?

text_block_list.name: Adventurer A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! What are you two playing as?! Those ears look pretty long...
Are you elves? Or maybe werewolves, judging by the tails?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nope! We're Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Adventurer B
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?! Umamusume... You mean, like real Umamusume? In a game like this? This is gonna be wild!

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhhh, Umamusume! The legend was true! Perhaps this is our
salvation sent from above.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The... legend? Could you explain?

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
It has long been foretold—grave peril will befall the land of Umanest.
And then...

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
"Fantasy incarnate shall look down upon this world from the heavens.
With innate, thunderous power, she will deliver unto the demon lord a
strike of destruction and felicity alike."

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
"Fantasy incarnate"... I suppose that could refer to us real-world
Umamusume, though I'm more concerned by the last bit.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The demon lord?! You're sayin' there's a big bad demon runnin'
around?

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. The demon lord appeared in this world but a few days prior
and has since defeated many of our brave heroes. How lost we are in
the face of this veritable crisis.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Estupendo! Did you hear that, Grass? There's no way we were sent
here by accident!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This demon lord's gotta be the source of our trouble! Ordinary folk
might not be able to stop 'em, but we Umamusume can! That's why we
were summoned here!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So, you think the demon lord is what triggered the bug? And...
considering the game's legend, we Umamusume hold the key to
defeating it?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure of it! All we gotta do is defeat the demon lord and our
problem will be fixed!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right. Time for a journey full of adventure, combat, and victory!
Let's defeat the demon lord and save this world while we're at it!
